name: prequel
description: Work with Prequel MCP servers (development and production environments) over HTTP with JWT authentication.

environment.title: Prequel Environment
environment.description: Which Prequel MCP environment to connect to. Use 'dev' for the development server (https://mcp-dev.prequel.dev) or 'prod' for the production server (https://mcp-beta.prequel.dev).

jwt_token.title: JWT Bearer Token
jwt_token.description: Bearer JWT token used to authenticate against the Prequel MCP server. Sent as the Authorization header.
